identityOneLiner: Read-only SQL checks of tool activity at verify time—not trace color.
heroTitle: Your trace says success. Persisted state is the verdict.
heroSubtitle: Check read-only state vs registries—not a green trace alone.
visitorProblemAnswer: Wrong data beats a green run. Read-only state is match or miss—use before ship or compliance.
heroOutcome: Traces lie. Your database is the verdict.
heroMechanism: Read-only SQL at verify time: declared tool activity vs your stores—not trace color.
guaranteeFootnote: Read-only at verification time; not proof which call wrote data. https://github.com/jwekavanagh/agentskeptic/blob/main/docs/verification-product-ssot.md

siteDefaultMetadata.title: AgentSkeptic
siteDefaultMetadata.description: Verify persisted state vs tool claims—read-only.

pageMetadata.title: Database truth vs traces
pageMetadata.description: Read-only checks vs stores—VERIFIED or inconsistent.

shareableTerminalDemo.title: Bundled terminal proof
shareableTerminalDemo.transcript:
### Success (`wf_complete`)

workflow_id: wf_complete
workflow_status: complete
trust: TRUSTED: Every step matched the database under the configured verification rules.
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Matched the database.

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_complete",
  "status": "complete",
  "steps": [{ "seq": 0, "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact", "status": "verified" }]
}

### Failure (`wf_missing`)

workflow_id: wf_missing
workflow_status: inconsistent
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result:Expected row is missing from the database (the log implies a write that is not present).
    reference_code: ROW_ABSENT

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_missing",
  "status": "inconsistent",
  "steps": [
    {
      "seq": 0,
      "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact",
      "status": "missing",
      "reasons": [{ "code": "ROW_ABSENT" }]
    }
  ]
}

r2.frameworkMaturity: CrewAI: ready. AutoGen: experimental. See python/FRAMEWORK_LOCK.md

integrate.title: Get started
integrate.description: Node 22+, read-only DB, NDJSON, tools.json. Command on /integrate; runbooks on GitHub.

pricing.positioning: Do not ship “success” on bad persisted state.
pricing.subtitle: Plans below. Read limits before checkout.

claim.title: Claim verification run — AgentSkeptic
claim.description: Link a CLI run to an account.

integratePage.proofLine: Declared activity matched read-only state for that workflow and registry on this run.
requirements: Not causal proof; read-only verify only

briefProblem: Claims vs read-only data; ROW_ABSENT when missing. Same demo as the site.

briefSections.heading: More
briefSections.body: Footer and GitHub: CI, commercial limits, more.

bullets: `ROW_ABSENT`: implied write; no row in read-only SQL.
Registry-bound claim; row value or presence fails.
Green step; persisted row still wrong.

mechanism.title: How
items: Map tool IDs to checks in `tools.json`.
Verify at the gate: JSON or exit—not trace color.
mechanism.notObservability: State vs claims; not logs or APM.

homeStakes.stakesTagline: Trust follows the row—revenue, compliance, customers.

notForYou: Need causal proof of a specific call.
Want APM or log search as a swap-in.
